items.title: Carrick geniet volop bij Man United: 'Met beide benen op de grond blijven staan'
items.summary: Michael Carrick zal zichzelf nog weleens in de arm knijpen. De eerste twee duels van Manchester United onder zijn leiding werden gewonnen tegen Manchester City en koploper Arsenal . Toch blijft de coach met beide benen op de grond staan.

items.title: Jans denkt niet na over opstappen: 'Ik zie nog steeds een rol voor mezelf'
items.summary: Ron Jans is niet bezig met een vertrek bij FC Utrecht. De Domstedelingen maken sportief een lastige periode door, maar de trainer peinst er voorlopig niet over om op te stappen. Als zijn tijd bij de club geweest is, moet dat de beslissing van iemand anders gaan zijn.

items.title: United into top 4 with win over leaders Arsenal
items.summary: Matheus Cunha struck in the 88th minute to hand Manchester United a sensational victory which dents Arsenal's title hopes.

items.title: Oviedo coach: Yamal goal from 'another galaxy'
items.summary: Real Oviedo coach Guillermo Almada branded Lamine Yamal a player from "another galaxy" after the Barcelona forward's wonder goal in Sunday's LaLiga meeting between the two sides.

items.title: Arteta challenges 'poor' Arsenal after Man Utd loss
items.summary: Mikel Arteta has challenged Arsenal to show the mental strength to win the Premier League after falling to a nervous 3-2 home defeat against Manchester United.

items.title: Sources: Fulham bid $38m for USMNT's Pepi
items.summary: Fulham have made a bid of €32 million ($38m) for the services of PSV forward Ricardo Pepi, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Steijn vertelt mooie anekdote over uitblinkende Drommel: 'Naar het strand gegaan'
items.summary: Maurice Steijn is in zijn nopjes met doelman Joël Drommel, die andermaal de uitblinker was aan de zijde van Sparta Rotterdam. Na de overwinning op FC Utrecht sprak de oefenmeester met verslaggever Kalum van Oudheusden over zijn keeper, de goede vorm van de ploeg en zijn wensen op de transfermarkt.

items.title: VI Live: Malen laat grote kans liggen tegen Milan
items.summary: Zondag wordt er weer volop gevoetbald in binnen- en buitenland. AZ gaat om 12.15 uur op bezoek bij Telstar, FC Groningen speelt tegen Fortuna Sittard, FC Utrecht ontvangt Sparta Rotterdam en ook in het buitenland staat ons veel moois te wachten. Volg het in de VI Live.

items.title: Dani de Wit baalt: 'Je wil het voor de trainer doen, maar ook voor de fans'
items.summary: Dani de Wit was hevig teleurgesteld na het nieuwe puntverlies van FC Utrecht. Thuis werd er verloren van Sparta en dus zakt de club verder in een crisis.

items.title: Cunha scores stunning late winner as Man Utd beat Arsenal
items.summary: Two sensational second-half strikes give Manchester United a huge win that takes them above Chelsea and Liverpool into fourth.

items.title: Buendia scores screamer as Villa beat Newcastle
items.summary: Emiliano Buendia and Ollie Watkins both score as high-flying Aston Villa end their long wait for a St James' Park victory against Newcastle United.

items.title: Estevao-inspired Chelsea beat Crystal Palace
items.summary: Estevao Willian replaces the injured Cole Palmer to inspire Chelsea to a comfortable win over Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park.

items.title: Forest boost survival hopes after win at Brentford
items.summary: Nottingham Forest gave their hopes of Premier League survival a major boost with a hard-fought win against Brentford at Gtech Community Stadium.

items.title: Beating Arsenal puts Man United into Premier League title race
items.summary: Man United are 12 points behind league-leading Arsenal, but after beating the Gunners on Sunday, can the Red Devils pull off an unlikely title push?

items.title: 'Intoxicating title fight impossible to call as Hearts refuse to buckle'
items.summary: Depleted Scottish Premiership leaders Hearts passed the latest test of their mettle in compelling draw with Celtic, writes Tom English.

items.title: Arsenal's mental strength questioned by Vieira
items.summary: Arsenal's former captain Patrick Vieira has questioned the Gunners' "mental strength" in the Premier League title race after they lost at home to Manchester United.

items.title: Cunha’s stunner earns Manchester United thrilling late win at Arsenal
items.summary: The Emirates Stadium was a sea of anxiety. Arsenal fans are acutely aware that a first Premier League title since 2004 is within their grasp and when it is so tantalising, it will be fraught. Especially when matches such as this become a grind. When the attacking patterns do not work. When the team look vulnerable. Arsenal could feel their nearest rivals, Manchester City and Aston Villa, on their backs. Both had won to cut their lead at the top to four points. Mikel Arteta’s team had drawn their previous two league matches 0-0 – against Liverpool and Nottingham Forest. They were desperate for something here and when Patrick Dorgu put Manchester United 2-1 up with a scorching drive early in the second half, they would have taken anything. They would end with nothing – apart from a thumping headache. Continue reading...

items.title: Two WONDER strikes fire Man Utd to huge win in five-goal thriller at Emirates!
items.summary: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Arsenal’s match against Manchester United in the Premier League.

items.title: Another BEAUTY! Cunha wins it for Man Utd with STUNNING strike!
items.summary: Matheus Cunha scores a brilliant goal for Manchester United to put them 3-2 up in their Premier League clash with Arsenal.

items.title: Will Hearts be caught by Celtic or Rangers in thrilling title race?
items.summary: "We've been top of the league for four months - that's not just a purple patch."
